positive: A symmetrical, stylized minimalist design featuring a mythical lunar fox spirit seated amid vibrant stylized bioluminescent florals. The style should be Neo-Art Deco mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, emphasizing strong, clean, crisp black silhouettes against a dynamic, gradient midnight blue and deep emerald green background. The composition must be highly central and balanced, suitable for direct apparel printing. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic, flat graphic design quality, illuminated by an ethereal, subtle moonlight glow. Concept art, Zentangle inspired detail.
